title: Bridge Essay: Connecting Mind-Body Therapy-Mediated Effects to Pathological Features of Alzhei

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through Connecting, Mind-Body, Therapy-Mediated, Effects, to.

**Connecting Mind-Body Therapy-Mediated Effects to Pathological Features of Alzheimer's Disease.** — J Alzheimers Dis. PMID: 33044183. DOI: 10.3233/JAD-200743. Alzheimer'sdisease (AD) is acomplex, multifactorial neurodegenerative disorder that represents amajor and increasing global health challenge. In most cases, the first clinical symptoms of AD are preceded by neuropathological changes in the brain that develop years to decades before their onset. Therefore, research in the last years has focused on this preclinical stage of AD trying to discover intervention strategies that might, if implemented effectively, delay or prevent disease progression
